title: Simple Batteries
body:
This mod adds a simple way for energy storage, Batteries! THese batteries can range from being quite simple to craft to a tad bit more difficult. Each tier of battery has better and better storage capacity but gets more complicated to craft.

# Batteries

## Batteries Tier 1:
### Basic Battery:
The simplest and easiest form of battery with a storage capacity of 50,000Fe
### Upgraded Battery:
A slightly better version of the Basic Battery an 80,000Fe storage capacity and a slightly better transfer speed
### Improved Battery:
An even better version of the upgraded battery with a capcity of 120,000Fe and transfer speed of 200Fe

## Batteries Tier 2:
### Multi-Cell Battery:
The base level of the tier 2 batteries with a maximum capacity of 400,000Fe and transfer speed of 400fe
### Single Use Battery:
This is a unique battery that cannot be recharged, when broken it will give you the housing which can be recrafted into the battery using a **power cell**. This battery, when placed, already has 200,000Fe with transfer speeds of 200Fe

## Batteries Tier 3(coppiron):
### Charged Battery:
An improved version of the Multi-Cell battery with a maximum capacity of 2,000,000Fe and transfer speed of 1000Fe. This battery is also the start of the use of coppiron.
### Coppiron Battery:
A heavily modified version of the charged battery being mostly made out of coppiron. This battery has a maximum capacity of 6,400,000Fe with transfer speeds of 6,000Fe

# Items

## Ingredients:
### Condensed Redstone:
A condensed form of redstone capable of holding a small charge.

### Iron Sheet:
A thin layer of iron.

### Raw Electricity:
The purest form of electricty made by smelting **electranite**.

### Electranite:
Obtained by mining Electranite ore.

### Coppiron(block):
Made by combining Iron, Copper and Raw Electricity.

### Coppiron Ingot:
made from coppiron blocks.

### Basic Capacitor:
A small piece of technology mostly used for tier 1 batteries.

### Cell:
Made by trapping **Raw Electricity** in a shell. Cells are used for some tier 2 batteries and can be used to make upgraded cells

### Power Cell:
An upgraded version of the cell only currently used to fuel the single use batteries.

### Super Cell:
A super version of the cell used for tier 3 batteries upgraded with the strength of **coppiron**.

## Other:

### Energometer:
Measure the amount of electricity and maximum electricy in an object.
